session_focus: Remove the need for task agents to edit TASK.md directly by making canonical sync own task promotion.
user_directives: Remove the need for task agents to edit TASK.md directly by making canonical sync own task promotion.
assistant_responses: Canonical sync now retires satisfied TASK.md and promotes the next runnable task automatically. Variant 33 preserves the conversation milestone as reusable training data rather than transient chat.
training_value: Task progression belongs to the orchestrator, not to arbitrary task implementations.

Task allowed_paths prevented agents from updating TASK.md even when a GUI node was truly complete. Variant 33 reframes the same milestone through the lens of runtime verification, UI trust, and repo-backed data visibility.
